name: Newton Nordic AB
summary: Newton Nordic AB, a technology company, develops remote control of moving cameras, and stabilization products for the TV and film industry worldwide. The company offers Newton S2, a stabilized remote head, which is used on various moving applications, such as telescopic cranes, cable cams, high-speed rails, tower cams, tracking cars, motorcycles, and boats. Its Newton system is used in live TV productions in sports, music, entertainment, and events. The company was formerly known as Intuitive Aerial AB (publ) and changed its name to Newton Nordic AB in September 2019. Newton Nordic AB was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Linkoping, Sweden.
